app.name: OIKOS Hub
app.description: Multi-church system for bulletins, worship services, teams, and community management

login.syncDescription: We are validating your profile and linking your account.
login.signUpDescription: Create your account with the same email approved by administration
login.firstAccessHintBody: An administrator must approve your email first. After that, you can create your account here or sign in with Google/Microsoft using the same email.
login.expiredSession: Your session expired. Sign in again to continue.
login.pendingAccess: Your access has not been approved yet.
login.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email before signing in.
login.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters long.
login.signUpSuccess: Account created. If email confirmation is enabled, finish confirmation and then sign in normally.

history.title: Previous bulletins
history.empty: No previous bulletins are available for this church.
history.loadHistoryError: Could not load previous bulletins right now.
history.invalidJson: Could not read the server response.

publicRequests.title: Requests
publicRequests.name: Your name
publicRequests.subject: Subject
publicRequests.chooseChurchHint: First choose the church from the public bulletin. Then come back to send your request.
publicRequests.churchNotFound: We could not find a public church for this link.
publicRequests.success: Request sent successfully to {church}. The team will care for you with attention.

scripture.text: I exhort therefore, that, first of all, supplications, prayers, intercessions, and giving of thanks, be made for all men; for kings, and for all that are in authority; that we may lead a quiet and peaceable life in all godliness and honesty. For this is good and acceptable in the sight of God our Saviour; who will have all men to be saved, and to come unto the knowledge of the truth.

invites.disabledDescription: This link can no longer be used because the invite flow was removed from the system.

dashboard.title: Church Dashboard
dashboard.subtitleWithChurch: People, access, and activity indicators for {church}.
dashboard.subtitleGeneric: People, access, and activity indicators for the church.
dashboard.description: This panel summarizes member records, families, age ranges, app engagement, and the rhythm of published services.
dashboard.errorTitle: The dashboard could not be loaded

empty.title: Select a church to begin
empty.description: As soon as a church is defined, we will show the overview of people, families, access, and services.

notes.inactiveRecords: {count} records are inactive or closed and remain outside the main cards.

sections.rolesDescription: {serving} people are serving in ministry roles, within a total of {access} people with app access.

charts.noPeopleData: There is not enough people data for this chart yet.
charts.noActivityData: There are no services recorded for this period yet.
charts.noRolesData: There are no people with app access in service roles yet.

insights.registryText: The church has {count} registered people, with {active} active records considered in the main panel.
insights.accessText: {percent} of the active base already has app access, and {serving} is in service roles.
insights.familyText: {percent} of the active base is already associated with family groups, totaling {families} families.

roleNotes.musico: Worship team and instrumentalists linked to the app.
roleNotes.staff: Operational support, tech, and service organization.
roleNotes.seminarista: People in ministry training and support roles.
roleNotes.diacono: Diaconal service and practical care for the church.
roleNotes.presbitero: Local leadership, shepherding, and church governance.
roleNotes.admin: Administrative management and sensitive system access.

music.noData: There are no music executions for this period yet.
music.noKeys: There are no recorded keys for this period yet.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.name: Name
profile.skillsDescription: Select the areas where you can serve.
profile.linkedPersonNotFound: The person linked to this account was not found.
